计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续 高热，与该校工科优势方向匹配；山西省2026年物理类考生167419人，较2025年173347人减少5928人（-3.4%），竞争略有缓解；长安大学位于陕西西安，与山西相邻，地域接受度高；该校在山西省招生占比约4.7%（2025年），属中等偏上水平，无明显地域偏好变化。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 23522 → 13611 → 9627 → 16053 → 19992, showing a fluctuating trend of first rising, then falling, then rising again; in 2024, the ranking significantly dropped to 16053, and in 2025, it further dropped to 19992, with a cumulative decline of about 10365 places over the past two years, reflecting intensifying competition; the 2025 baseline is approximately 19992; the provincial science group enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 202 → 202 → 204 → 210 → 219 people, showing a gradual small expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 211 people, a decrease of 8 people (-3.7%) from 2025, marking the first contraction in five years, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked approximately 89th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with fluctuations between 84 and 92 in recent years, overall stable; located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, it is an important engineering university in the northwest region; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 83rd (sample of 14 videos), rated as 'average', with no obvious negative public opinion or enrollment gap records; the school is commonly evaluated online as 'strength greater than fame', with stable application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Transportation Engineering was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the school, directly corresponding to core enrollment majors such as Road, Bridge and River Crossing Engineering, Traffic Engineering, and Transportation, providing stable attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly popular socially, matching the school's engineering strengths; in 2026, there are 167,419 physics category candidates in Shanxi Province, a decrease of 5,928 people (-3.4%) from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition; Chang'an University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, adjacent to Shanxi, with high regional acceptance; the school's enrollment proportion in Shanxi Province is about 4.7% (2025), at an upper-middle level, with no obvious changes in regional preference.
8. [Prediction Conclusion] Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 19992, the 2026 enrollment contraction of 3.7%, and the 3.4% decrease in provincial physics category candidates: contraction pushes the ranking number higher (intensified competition), while the decrease in candidates pushes the ranking number lower (eased competition), roughly offsetting each other; however, the significant ranking drop in 2025 may include volatility from the first year of the new college entrance exam, with some recovery expected in 2026 as the second year. After comprehensive consideration, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 19354, with a range of 18854–19854.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group was approximately 1920 → 2249 → 2215 → 2272 → 3411. From 2021 to 2024, it remained stable in the 1900–2300 range, but in 2025 it significantly dropped to 3411 (an increase of 1139 places), mainly due to the first year of the new college entrance examination reform (History Category). The baseline for 2025 is approximately 3411. The provincial liberal arts group enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 14 → 13 → 11 → 11 → 21, with a substantial expansion to 21 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 13, a decrease of 8 (-38.1%) compared to 2025, marking the largest reduction in the past five years, leading to significantly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked approximately 89th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking. It is a science and engineering institution with a small scale of liberal arts programs, maintaining a stable overall level. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 83rd, rated as 'average.' The university is known for its engineering strengths, and the attention to its liberal arts programs is relatively stable, with no significant negative public opinion. The liberal arts majors it offers (Journalism and Communication, Ideological and Political Education, English, Public Administration, Architecture, etc.) have no corresponding A- or above discipline evaluations, with its advantageous disciplines concentrated in engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged, Ideological and Political Education is stable, and English/Foreign Languages are generally watched with caution. In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Shanxi Province is 63,113, a decrease of 21,766 (-25.6%) from 84,879 in 2025, significantly easing competition. Chang'an University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, adjacent to Shanxi, with good regional acceptance. The university's liberal arts enrollment scale is small (13 students), accounting for approximately 4.7% of the total enrollment in Shanxi Province, with an even lower proportion for liberal arts.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the three factors of the 2025 baseline ranking of 3411, the significant enrollment reduction of 38.1% in 2026, and the substantial decrease of 25.6% in History Category examinees in the province: the enrollment reduction pushes the ranking number higher (intensified competition), while the decrease in examinees pushes the ranking number lower (eased competition), with opposite directions. However, the reduction in examinees (-25.6%) is smaller than the enrollment reduction (-38.1%), resulting in a net effect of slightly intensified competition. Additionally, the significant ranking drop in 2025 includes fluctuations from the first year of the new college entrance exam, with a partial rebound expected in 2026. After comprehensive weighing, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2682, with a range of 2199–3165.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 2199), prioritize reaching for Ideological and Political Education. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 3165), it is advisable to rely mainly on Tier 3 safety options.
